title: activity — registered log names catalog
description: Every `log_name` string a downstream module may pass to `LogOptions::useLogName()`. Seeded at module boot into the registry cache. Adding a new feed = add an entry here + PR review. Consumer modules validate their `getActivitylogOptions()` returns a log_name from this catalog at model boot; unknown values throw UNKNOWN_LOG_NAME.

log_names.name: default
log_names.description: Catch-all feed for activities without a domain-specific home. Consumers should prefer a specific log_name when one exists — 'default' is for edge cases + one-off events.

log_names.name: bookings
log_names.description: Facility bookings — create, confirm, reschedule, cancel. Every booking mutation surfaces here.

log_names.name: athletes
log_names.description: Athlete lifecycle — enrollment, transfer between teams, active/inactive status. Does NOT include progress or evaluation entries (those route to audit for retention + regulator visibility).

log_names.name: teams
log_names.description: Team formation, roster changes, coach assignments, session schedule updates.

log_names.name: branch-management
log_names.description: Branch settings changes, staff assignments to branches, facility create/update at a branch. Admin-facing feed.

log_names.name: auth
log_names.description: Login / logout / MFA-enrolled events. Auth events attributed to the User as subject + causer. Does NOT include password changes or MFA-secret changes (those route to audit for security-critical retention).

log_names.name: billing
log_names.description: Invoice state transitions (draft → sent → paid → overdue). Money-sensitive field mutations (amount, tax) route to audit exclusively.

log_names.name: attendance
log_names.description: Attendance mark for a session — present / absent / late. High-volume feed on active academies; disable broadcast + digest on that feed is common. Off by default in broadcast to avoid feed noise; enabled per-tenant setting.

log_names.name: communications
log_names.description: Announcements, direct messages sent, broadcasts to teams. Content itself is NOT captured — activity records the metadata (recipient count, subject line, delivery status).

log_names.name: system
log_names.description: Platform-emitted activities not attributed to a human causer — scheduled job outcomes, integration syncs, entitlement provisioning results. Causer is the SystemCauser sentinel.
